name: company-product-dev-copilot
displayName: Company Product Dev Copilot - Ralph PRD Skills Edition
description: Enterprise VS Code Copilot Chat participant with Ralph-style PRD decomposition, prd.json conversion, prompt optimization, attachment-aware context, OpenCode-compatible prompts/skills, DESIGN.md UI design, NL2SQL, SQL translation/review, policy packs, and bank-grade data workflows.

chatParticipants.name: product-dev
chatParticipants.description: Bank-grade product development and data engineering workflow assistant with interactive init, fullstack scaffolding, and data delivery governance.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Stack-driven initialization: generate only the requested frontend/backend/data project structure plus Copilot/opencode assets.

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan current repository and generate a repo map.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Create an ordered delivery plan and recommended command sequence for the current task.

commands.name: attachments
commands.description: Show active editor context and Chat attachments/references that will be injected into optimized prompts.

commands.name: loop
commands.description: Start a Ralph-style loop using external state and execute iterative workflow steps.

commands.name: loop-next
commands.description: Continue the next pending Ralph loop iteration from .product-dev/ralph-loop.local.json.

commands.name: loop-status
commands.description: Show current Ralph loop state, progress, next command, and outstanding tasks.

commands.name: loop-stop
commands.description: Stop the active Ralph loop and mark it as paused/stopped.

commands.name: prompt
commands.description: Optimize rough prompts into enterprise-grade prompts with role, context, constraints, output schema, and evaluation criteria.

commands.name: summarize
commands.description: Summarize selected text, documents, or repository context into decision-ready notes.

commands.name: compress
commands.description: Compress long context into a compact briefing for Copilot, Claude Code, Codex, or Ralph loop execution.

commands.name: doc-review
commands.description: Review prompts, documents, PRDs, designs, SQL, or release notes with severity and actionable fixes.

commands.name: rewrite
commands.description: Rewrite or upgrade content for executive, product, technical, banking-grade, or implementation-ready use.

commands.name: checklist
commands.description: Generate execution checklists, DoD, review checklists, handoff checklists, and acceptance checklists.

commands.name: policy-init
commands.description: Create local policy pack folders and rule templates for company, department, country, project, and environment overlays.

commands.name: policy-intake
commands.description: Ask interactive questions to identify which company/department/country/project rules must be supplied.

commands.name: policy-scan
commands.description: Scan .product-dev/policy-packs and policies folders, inventory loaded rules, and detect missing policy files.

commands.name: policy-review
commands.description: Review policy pack completeness, conflicts, precedence, and applicability to the current workflow.

commands.name: brainstorm
commands.description: Brainstorm product opportunities, feature ideas, experiments, and MVP options.

commands.name: feature
commands.description: Convert brainstorm ideas into structured feature design.

commands.name: prd
commands.description: Generate or update PRD from user input and repository context.

commands.name: story-split
commands.description: Split PRD or feature scope into Ralph-sized one-iteration user stories with dependency-safe ordering.

commands.name: prd-json
commands.description: Convert PRD Markdown or feature design into Ralph-compatible prd.json with passes:false userStories.

commands.name: ralph-readiness
commands.description: Review PRD, prd.json, progress.txt, AGENTS.md, quality checks, and story size for Ralph loop readiness.

commands.name: journey
commands.description: Generate user journey and identify friction points from frontend code.

commands.name: design-md
commands.description: Read existing frontend UI code or user design intent and generate a Stitch-compatible root DESIGN.md plus reviewable docs artifact.

commands.name: ui-design
commands.description: Generate implementation-ready UI design guidance using DESIGN.md, existing frontend context, and user design direction.

commands.name: frontend
commands.description: Design or implement frontend pages, components, state management, validation, tests, and accessibility.

commands.name: backend
commands.description: Design backend services, APIs, domain model, security, observability, and tests.

commands.name: springboot
commands.description: Generate or review Java Spring Boot service design, controllers, DTOs, services, repositories, tests, and configuration.

commands.name: python
commands.description: Generate or review Python backend design, FastAPI/Flask services, data services, tests, and packaging.

commands.name: data
commands.description: Design data development solution: data model, ingestion, transformation, quality, lineage, governance, and serving.

commands.name: sql
commands.description: Generate or optimize SQL for PostgreSQL, MaxCompute, BigQuery, Oracle, and other engines.

commands.name: dbschema
commands.description: Design or review database schema, indexes, partitions, constraints, and migration scripts.

commands.name: pipeline
commands.description: Design data pipelines, orchestration, retry, idempotency, SLA, monitoring, and backfill strategy.

commands.name: quality
commands.description: Generate quality gates for code, API, data, testing, security, and release readiness.

commands.name: task
commands.description: Split PRD or feature design into implementation tasks.

commands.name: api
commands.description: Generate or validate API contract.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Run enterprise code review against current git diff.

commands.name: test
commands.description: Generate test plan and test cases from PRD, code, and diff.

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Compare git diff with PRD, journey, API contract, and test plan.

commands.name: release
commands.description: Generate release notes, go-live checklist, rollback plan, and risk assessment.

commands.name: intake
commands.description: Ask targeted questions for missing business, governance, and technology-stack context.

commands.name: context
commands.description: Capture user answers and update project background, stack decisions, and local context.

commands.name: datacontract
commands.description: Generate bank-grade data contract and compatibility rules.

commands.name: sttm
commands.description: Generate Source-to-Target Mapping and transformation rules.

commands.name: dq
commands.description: Generate executable data quality rules and SQL checks.

commands.name: reconcile
commands.description: Generate reconciliation design, SQL checks, and exception handling.

commands.name: lineage
commands.description: Generate table/field lineage analysis and Mermaid lineage graph.

commands.name: sql-translate
commands.description: Translate SQL across Oracle, PostgreSQL, BigQuery, MaxCompute, Hive, etc.

commands.name: migration
commands.description: Design data/schema migration, dual-run, validation, and rollback.

commands.name: scheduler
commands.description: Design DAG scheduling, dependency, retry, SLA, and alerting strategy.

commands.name: privacy
commands.description: Generate data privacy, masking, retention, and access-control assessment.

commands.name: data-test
commands.description: Generate data testing strategy and executable test cases.

commands.name: data-review
commands.description: Run bank-grade data engineering review for SQL/model/pipeline/release.

commands.name: catalog
commands.description: Generate data catalog entry and business glossary.

commands.name: semantic
commands.description: Generate semantic layer and agent-readable data card.

commands.name: cost
commands.description: Generate database/cloud cost optimization plan.

commands.name: runbook
commands.description: Generate production runbook, incident playbook, and backfill playbook.

commands.name: skill-init
commands.description: Create .product-dev/skills with example custom skills.

commands.name: skill-scan
commands.description: Scan and list user-defined custom skills.

commands.name: skill-run
commands.description: Run a named custom skill against the supplied task.

commands.name: skill-review
commands.description: Review local custom skills for prompt quality and governance readiness.

commands.name: resources-init
commands.description: Initialize portable prompt/skill resources under agent-resources/ and .product-dev/prompts for Copilot today and OpenCode migration later.

commands.name: resources-scan
commands.description: Scan portable prompts, skills, Copilot shims, and OpenCode shims for migration readiness.

commands.name: nl2sql
commands.description: Convert natural language business questions into safe SQL for PostgreSQL, Oracle, BigQuery, MaxCompute/ODPS, MySQL, SQL Server, Snowflake, Databricks/Spark SQL, or Hive.

commands.name: sql-review
commands.description: Review SQL for correctness, join/grain risk, performance, DQ, reconciliation, privacy, dialect compatibility, and production readiness.

companyProductDev.modelFamily.description: Preferred model family when request.model is unavailable.

companyProductDev.writeArtifacts.description: Whether to write generated artifacts to workspace files.

companyProductDev.maxContextFiles.description: Maximum source files included in repository context.

companyProductDev.defaultBackendStack.description: Default backend stack used when user request is ambiguous.

companyProductDev.defaultDatabaseEngine.description: Default SQL/database engine used when the request is ambiguous.

companyProductDev.generatedCodeMode.description: Controls how aggressively commands generate implementation code.

companyProductDev.ralphMaxIterations.description: Maximum number of workflow iterations to run for /loop before requiring user review.

companyProductDev.ralphAutoRun.description: When true, /loop runs multiple iterations immediately. When false, it initializes the loop and runs one safe iteration.

companyProductDev.workflowMode.description: Controls whether each command gives strict next-step guidance or flexible options.

companyProductDev.initScaffoldMode.description: Default scaffold mode used by /init when user does not specify a track.

companyProductDev.defaultDataEngines.description: Default database engines for generated data engineering folders and prompts.

companyProductDev.promptOptimizationMode.description: Controls deterministic user input optimization before each @product-dev command.

companyProductDev.skillRegistryEnabled.description: When true, commands load matching user-defined skills from .product-dev/skills/.

companyProductDev.skillRoot.description: Workspace-relative folder for user-defined skill packs.

companyProductDev.ralphWorkDir.description: Workspace-relative directory that stores Ralph prompt.md, CLAUDE.md, prd.json, progress.txt, and archives.

companyProductDev.ralphRequireBrowserVer.description: When true, frontend Ralph stories must include browser or manual visual verification acceptance criteria.
